name: Chocolate Sunshine Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the butter until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add sugar and beat until well combined.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in vanilla extract.
4. Sift together flour, cocoa powder, cornstarch, instant coffee, baking soda, and salt.
5. Alternate adding milk with the dry ingredients, beginning and ending with the dry mixture.
6. Grease two 9-inch round pans and dust lightly with cocoa powder.
7. Pour batter into prepared pans.
8. Bake in a preheated oven for 20 minutes.
9. Allow cakes to cool in pans for 10 minutes before removing.
10. Cool the rest of the way on a wire rack.
11. Cut each cake into two layers.
12. Spread filling over the bottom halves.
13. Place top halves back together and cover with wrap until ready to serve.
FILLING:
1. In a bowl, beat all ingredients for the filling until smooth.
2. Refrigerate until needed.
